title: Login succeeds and redirects to Dashboard with KPI cards visible
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the dashboard where KPI content is visible.

title: Invalid credentials show an error message and stay on Login page
description: Verifies an invalid email/password combination shows a visible error message without redirecting to the dashboard.

title: Login validation: submit with both fields empty shows required errors
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission and displays validation messages when email and password are missing.

title: Login validation: invalid email format shows validation error
description: Verifies the login form shows a visible validation error when the email format is invalid.

title: Login validation: missing password shows required error
description: Verifies the login form shows a required error when password is missing.

title: Login validation: missing email shows required error
description: Verifies the login form shows a required error when email is missing.

title: Error state clears after correcting credentials and re-submitting
description: Verifies a user can recover from an invalid-credentials error by entering valid credentials and successfully logging in.

title: Password field supports Enter key submission
description: Verifies pressing Enter after entering credentials submits the form and logs the user in.

title: Show validation error when confirm password does not match
description: Verifies the registration form blocks submission and shows a password confirmation mismatch error.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name input field
Type "test.user+e2e2@example.com" into the email input field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the password input field
Type "DifferentPass123!" into the confirm password field

title: Require name field on registration
description: Verifies the form shows a validation error when name is missing.

steps.description: Type "test.user+e2e3@example.com" into the email input field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the password input field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the confirm password field

title: Require email field on registration
description: Verifies the form shows a validation error when email is missing.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name input field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the password input field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the confirm password field

title: Validate email format on registration
description: Verifies the form shows a validation error when the email format is invalid.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name input field
Type "not-an-email" into the email input field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the password input field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the confirm password field

title: Require password field on registration
description: Verifies the form shows a validation error when password is missing.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name input field
Type "test.user+e2e6@example.com" into the email input field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the confirm password field

title: Prevent registration when confirm password is empty
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows a validation error when confirmation is missing.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name input field
Type "test.user+e2e7@example.com" into the email input field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the password input field

title: Request password reset for an existing account shows confirmation message
description: Verifies that submitting the forgot-password form shows a non-error confirmation message.

steps.description: Click on the send reset link button
Verify text "If an account exists" is visible

title: Request password reset with unknown email does not reveal account existence
description: Verifies the confirmation message is shown even when an unrecognized email is submitted.

steps.description: Click on the send reset link button
Verify text "If an account exists" is visible
Verify text "No account" is not visible

title: Forgot-password requires an email value
description: Verifies the form shows a validation message when submitting with an empty email field.

steps.description: Click on the send reset link button

title: Forgot-password rejects an invalid email format
description: Verifies the form shows a validation message when the email is not in a valid format.

steps.description: Click on the send reset link button

title: Reset password page loads and allows entering a new password
description: Verifies the reset-password page renders and accepts a new password input.

steps.description: Type "NewStrongPassword!123" into the new password field

title: Reset password success redirects user to login page
description: Verifies that submitting a valid reset sets the new password and routes back to the login page.

steps.description: Type "NewStrongPassword!123" into the new password field
Click on the reset password button

title: Reset password with invalid or expired token shows an error message
description: Verifies the UI shows an invalid/expired token error when reset cannot be completed.

steps.description: Type "NewStrongPassword!123" into the new password field
Click on the reset password button

title: Reset password requires a new password value
description: Verifies the reset form shows a validation message when submitting with an empty password field.

steps.description: Click on the reset password button

title: Dashboard loads and shows core sections (KPIs, charts, lists, alerts)
description: Verifies the authenticated user can reach the Dashboard and see the expected KPI, chart, upcoming events, and low-stock sections.

title: Dashboard KPI cards are visible and labeled correctly
description: Verifies the Dashboard financial KPI cards for net sales, cash collected, and VAT are visible for an authenticated user.

title: Monthly event status chart is visible on Dashboard
description: Verifies the monthly event status chart section renders on the Dashboard for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Verify element "Monthly event status chart" is visible

title: Financial comparison chart is visible on Dashboard
description: Verifies the Dashboard includes a financial comparison chart section for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Verify element "Financial comparison chart" is visible

title: Upcoming events list is visible and shows list state
description: Verifies the upcoming events section is present and displays either events or an empty-state message.

steps.description: Verify element "Upcoming events list" is visible
Verify text "No upcoming events" is visible

title: Clicking an upcoming event navigates to Event Summary
description: Verifies a user can open an event by clicking it from the Dashboard upcoming events list and lands on the event summary page.

steps.description: Click on the first event in the "Upcoming Events" list

title: Low-stock inventory alerts section is visible and shows list state
description: Verifies the low stock alerts section is present and displays either alerts or an empty-state message.

steps.description: Verify element "Low stock inventory alerts list" is visible
Verify text "No low stock alerts" is visible

title: Dashboard onboarding checklist is visible and can be completed
description: Verifies the onboarding checklist is available on the Dashboard and a checklist item can be marked complete.

steps.description: Click on the first incomplete onboarding checklist item

title: Search clients filters the client list results
description: Verifies that typing into the client list search bar filters visible clients.

title: Create a new client and see it in the client list
description: Verifies that a user can create a client and the new client appears in the list after save.

steps.description: Fill "E2E Client A" into the Name field

title: Client form shows validation errors for invalid email
description: Verifies that the client creation form blocks save and shows validation for an invalid email format.

steps.description: Fill "E2E Invalid Email Client" into the Name field

title: Open a client details page and see event history section
description: Verifies that selecting a client from the list navigates to details and shows the event history area.

steps.description: Click the first client entry in the list

title: Edit an existing client from client details
description: Verifies that a user can edit a client and see updated info on the details page.

steps.description: Click the first client entry in the list
Fill "Updated notes from E2E" into the Notes field
Verify text "Updated notes from E2E" is visible

title: Sort clients by name changes the visible ordering
description: Verifies that sorting by name updates the ordering of the client list.

steps.description: Verify text "Sorted by name" is visible
Verify text "Sorted by name" is visible

title: Paginate through clients list and return to previous page
description: Verifies that pagination controls move between pages of clients.

title: Create a new event via the 5-step wizard and land on Event Summary
description: Verifies a user can complete all 5 steps of the event wizard and successfully save, landing on an event summary page with expected tabs visible.

steps.description: Click on the "New Event" button or "Create Event" link
Select a client from the client dropdown

title: Event wizard Step 1 captures scheduling and basic details and proceeds to Step 2
description: Verifies Step 1 required fields (client/date/time/service/guests) can be entered and user can proceed to Step 2.

steps.description: Click on the "New Event" button or "Create Event" link
Select a client from the client dropdown
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 2

title: Event wizard Step 2 adds products from catalog and proceeds to Step 3
description: Verifies products can be added from the catalog with quantities and the wizard can proceed to extras.

steps.description: Click on the "New Event" button or "Create Event" link
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 2
Click "Add Product" (or equivalent) to open the product catalog

title: Event wizard Step 3 adds an extra line item and proceeds to Step 4
description: Verifies an extra line item (description, cost, price) can be added and the wizard proceeds to equipment step.

steps.description: Click on the "New Event" button or "Create Event" link
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 2
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 3

title: Event wizard Step 4 shows equipment conflicts and allows adding equipment when available
description: Verifies the equipment step displays conflict messaging when relevant and supports adding available equipment, then proceeds forward.

steps.description: Click on the "New Event" button or "Create Event" link
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 2
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 3
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 4

title: Event wizard Step 5 sets financial terms and saves event to Event Summary
description: Verifies discount, tax, deposit percent, and cancellation policy can be set and saving redirects to an event summary page showing key tabs.

steps.description: Click on the "New Event" button or "Create Event" link
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 2
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 3
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 4

title: Equipment conflict blocks saving until resolved
description: Verifies that when an equipment conflict is detected, the UI shows a conflict warning and prevents saving the event until the conflict is addressed.

steps.description: Click on the "New Event" button or "Create Event" link
Select a client from the client dropdown
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 2
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 3
Click the "Next" button to go to Step 4

title: Open Product Catalog and start creating a new product from the list page
description: Verifies an authenticated user can reach the product list, use search/filter UI, and start the New Product flow.

title: Create a new product with recipe ingredient and save
description: Verifies a user can create a product with required fields and at least one recipe ingredient, then see it in the product list.

title: Save product without required fields shows validation errors
description: Verifies the product form blocks saving and shows visible validation messages when required fields are missing.

title: Search and category filter update the product list results
description: Verifies search input and category filter can be used to refine visible products on the list page.

title: Open a product from the list and view details including recipe cost breakdown
description: Verifies a user can open a product details page and see recipe/cost breakdown content.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the product list

title: Edit an existing product and save changes
description: Verifies a user can edit product fields and successfully save updates.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the product list

title: Delete a product from details page with confirmation
description: Verifies deleting a product requires confirmation and the product is no longer visible afterward in the list.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the product list

title: Plan limit: show upgrade banner and block saving a new product when limit reached
description: Verifies that when the plan limit is reached, the UI shows an upgrade prompt and prevents creating another product.

title: Filter inventory list by type: Ingredient
description: Verifies that filtering the inventory list by Ingredient shows only ingredient items (or an empty-state if none).

steps.description: Select "Ingredient" from the Type filter dropdown

title: Filter inventory list by type: Equipment
description: Verifies that filtering the inventory list by Equipment shows only equipment items (or an empty-state if none).

steps.description: Select "Equipment" from the Type filter dropdown

title: Create a new inventory item (end-to-end)
description: Verifies a user can create a new inventory item from the inventory list and see it appear in the list after saving.

steps.description: Type "E2E Test Inventory Item" into the Name field
Type "10" into the Current Stock field
Type "2" into the Minimum Stock field
Type "3.50" into the Unit Cost field
Verify text "E2E Test Inventory Item" is visible

title: Calendar loads and shows calendar grid with events
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open Calendar View and see the calendar grid with event content present.

steps.description: Click on "Calendar" in the main navigation

title: Toggle from calendar view to list view shows events list
description: Verifies the user can switch to list view and see events presented in a list.

steps.description: Click on "Calendar" in the main navigation

title: Month navigation: next month updates the calendar period
description: Verifies clicking the next-month control changes the displayed month on the calendar.

steps.description: Click on "Calendar" in the main navigation

title: Date drill-down shows events for selected date
description: Verifies selecting a date shows the events for that date in the calendar context (e.g., a day detail panel or list).

steps.description: Click on "Calendar" in the main navigation
Click on a date cell in the calendar grid

title: Open event from calendar and navigate to Event Summary
description: Verifies an event can be opened from the calendar date drill-down and navigates to its summary page.

steps.description: Click on "Calendar" in the main navigation
Click on a date cell in the calendar grid that shows at least one event
Click on an event in the date’s event list

title: Filter by status shows only matching events (Confirmed)
description: Verifies using the status filter reduces results to events with the selected status.

steps.description: Click on "Calendar" in the main navigation
Select "Confirmed" from the status filter dropdown

title: List view search narrows results
description: Verifies the user can search events in list view and see the list update accordingly.

steps.description: Click on "Calendar" in the main navigation
Type "test" into the event search field

title: Global Search shows categorized results for a common query
description: Verifies that entering a query displays visible categorized result sections for clients, events, products, and inventory when matches exist.

steps.description: Click on "Search" in the main navigation

title: Global Search displays Events category when matches exist
description: Verifies that searching shows an Events category/section in the results list.

steps.description: Click on "Search" in the main navigation

title: Global Search displays Products category when matches exist
description: Verifies that searching shows a Products category/section in the results list.

steps.description: Click on "Search" in the main navigation

title: Global Search displays Inventory category when matches exist
description: Verifies that searching shows an Inventory category/section in the results list.

steps.description: Click on "Search" in the main navigation

title: Clicking a client result navigates to client details page
description: Verifies that selecting a client result from global search opens a client detail view.

steps.description: Click on "Search" in the main navigation
Click the first result under the "Clients" section

title: Search query with no matches shows a no-results message
description: Verifies that a query returning no matches displays a visible no-results empty state.

steps.description: Click on "Search" in the main navigation

title: Clearing the search input removes previously shown results
description: Verifies that when the search query is cleared, the results/empty-state updates accordingly (no stale results).

steps.description: Click on "Search" in the main navigation

title: Search is resilient to leading/trailing spaces in the query
description: Verifies that a query with extra spaces still produces results sections (or a consistent empty state) without UI errors.

steps.description: Click on "Search" in the main navigation
Type "   a   " into the search input

title: Update profile fields and save successfully
description: Verifies a logged-in user can update profile fields (name, email, business name) and sees a visible success/updated state after saving.

steps.description: Fill "Updated Test Name" into the name field
Fill "Updated Business Name" into the business name field

title: Set brand color and save
description: Verifies a logged-in user can change the brand color in Settings and save successfully.

steps.description: Fill "#3366FF" into the brand color value field

title: Update contract defaults and save successfully
description: Verifies a logged-in user can edit contract default values (deposit percent, cancellation days, refund percent) and sees a visible saved state.

steps.description: Fill "25" into the deposit percent field
Fill "14" into the cancellation days field
Fill "50" into the refund percent field

title: Contract defaults validation: reject out-of-range values
description: Verifies contract default fields show a visible validation message when values are out of allowed range and are not accepted.

steps.description: Fill "150" into the deposit percent field

title: Open Manage subscription from Settings
description: Verifies a logged-in user can start the subscription management flow from Settings and is redirected away from Settings to a subscription portal/session page.

title: View pricing page and verify Basic vs Pro comparison is visible
description: Ensures an authenticated user can open the Pricing page and see plan comparison content for Basic and Pro.

steps.description: Click the "Pricing" link in the main navigation

title: From pricing, verify Pro plan is visible and upgrade call-to-action is present
description: Validates that the Pro plan card is shown and an upgrade option is available to start checkout.

steps.description: Click the "Pricing" link in the main navigation

title: Start Stripe checkout from Pro upgrade button
description: Ensures clicking the Pro upgrade button initiates a redirect away from the app toward checkout.

steps.description: Click the "Pricing" link in the main navigation
Click the "Upgrade" button on the Pro plan

title: Pricing page handles slow subscription status load with visible loading state
description: Verifies the Pricing page provides a visible loading indicator/state while subscription status is being fetched.

steps.description: Click the "Pricing" link in the main navigation
Wait for the plan comparison to appear

title: Pricing page remains usable after returning from checkout (no blank screen)
description: Validates the app renders the pricing UI properly after a checkout round-trip (success or cancel) without getting stuck.

steps.description: Click the "Pricing" link in the main navigation
Wait for the Pricing page plan cards to appear

title: Admin user can open Admin Dashboard and view key user metrics
description: Verifies an admin can access /admin and sees total users and plan breakdown metrics.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation

title: Admin user can view plan distribution section and pie chart
description: Verifies the plan distribution breakdown is visible on the Admin Dashboard and the pie chart renders.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation
Verify element "Plan distribution pie chart" is visible

title: Admin user can view signup trends section and bar chart
description: Verifies the signup trends chart is visible on the Admin Dashboard.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation
Verify element "Signup trends bar chart" is visible

title: Admin user can see new signups KPIs (today/week/month)
description: Verifies the Admin Dashboard shows new signups KPI cards for multiple time ranges.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation
Verify text "New Signups Today" is visible
Verify text "New Signups This Week" is visible

title: Admin user can see platform totals for entities (events, clients, products)
description: Verifies the Admin Dashboard displays additional platform totals beyond user counts.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation

title: Admin Dashboard shows a loading state while fetching stats
description: Verifies the page provides user feedback while platform analytics are being loaded.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation

title: Admin can open Admin Users page and see the user list columns
description: Verifies an admin user can access /admin/users and sees key user list fields like email, name, plan, and subscription status.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation
Click on "Users" in the Admin section

title: Admin can view per-user usage counts from the user list
description: Verifies an admin can click a user entry and see usage metrics such as event/client/product counts.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation
Click on "Users" in the Admin section
Click on the first user in the user list

title: Admin can upgrade a user plan and see the plan updated
description: Verifies an admin can trigger an upgrade action for a user, confirm it, and see the user plan updated in the UI.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation
Click on "Users" in the Admin section
Click the "Upgrade" button for the first user in the list
Click the "Confirm" button in the confirmation dialog

title: Admin can cancel the upgrade confirmation without changing anything
description: Verifies that canceling the upgrade confirmation dialog leaves the user plan unchanged on the screen.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation
Click on "Users" in the Admin section
Click the "Upgrade" button for the first user in the list
Click the "Cancel" button in the confirmation dialog

title: Non-admin sees access denied when attempting to open Admin Users
description: Verifies a non-admin user is blocked from Admin Users and sees an access denied message.

title: Admin can identify subscription status information for a user
description: Verifies the user list displays subscription status information and it is visible for at least one row.

steps.description: Click on "Admin" in the main navigation
Click on "Users" in the Admin section
